title: cryptandra propinqua var. grandiflora
intro: Cryptandra propinqua var. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered cryptandra, is a plant species native to eastern Australia, specifically in the states of New South Wales and Queensland. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cryptandra propinqua var. grandiflora include relief from sore throats, fever, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, with the leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts.
